evals.prompt: Build me a voice chat customer support agent as a single HTML file. Use Sarvam AI (saarika:v2.5 for speech-to-text, bulbul:v2 for TTS) and Azure OpenAI GPT-3.5. Support all 11 Indian languages. The UI should look like WhatsApp with voice note bubbles and a waveform. Auto-play AI voice responses. Include a text fallback mode and a session summary panel. Save the file as support-agent.html
evals.expected_output: A complete, working support-agent.html file with all required features

assertions.text: Output is a single .html file with no external framework imports (no CDN links for React/Vue/Angular)
HTML contains all 11 Sarvam language codes: hi-IN, bn-IN, kn-IN, ml-IN, mr-IN, od-IN, pa-IN, ta-IN, te-IN, gu-IN, en-IN
Uses Sarvam STT endpoint (api.sarvam.ai/speech-to-text) with saarika:v2.5 model
Uses Sarvam TTS endpoint (api.sarvam.ai/text-to-speech) with bulbul:v2 model
Calls Azure OpenAI endpoint with api-key header and chat/completions path
Uses MediaRecorder API and getUserMedia for voice capture
Includes canvas-based waveform visualization
Has a session summary panel showing customer name, issue, and contact
Has a text input field for typed messages
Auto-plays AI audio response after TTS synthesis

evals.prompt: I need a customer support voice bot for my e-commerce company. Single HTML page, no frameworks. It should record voice using the browser mic, transcribe with Sarvam AI, send to Azure OpenAI for a response, speak back using Sarvam TTS. Users should be able to select from Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, and other Indian languages. Make it look professional with WhatsApp-style chat bubbles. Save as ecommerce-support.html
evals.expected_output: A customized e-commerce support HTML file with appropriate system prompt

assertions.text: Output is a single .html file with no external framework imports
Uses Sarvam STT endpoint with saarika:v2.5
Uses Sarvam TTS endpoint with bulbul:v2
Calls Azure OpenAI with proper headers
Uses MediaRecorder and getUserMedia
Includes multiple Indian language options including Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Bengali
Has WhatsApp-style chat bubble UI elements
Has text input fallback
Auto-plays AI audio

evals.prompt: Create a voice support agent HTML page for a bank. It needs: 11 Indian language support via Sarvam AI, Azure OpenAI backend, MediaRecorder API for voice capture, waveform visualization in chat bubbles, a session summary that captures customer name/issue/phone number, and a settings panel for API keys. The agent should be polite and professional. Output file: bank-support.html
evals.expected_output: A banking-themed support agent with appropriate security messaging in system prompt

assertions.text: Output is a single .html file
Includes all 11 Indian language options
Uses Sarvam STT with saarika:v2.5
Uses Sarvam TTS with bulbul:v2
Calls Azure OpenAI chat completions
Uses MediaRecorder API
Has waveform visualization in voice bubbles
Session summary captures name, issue, and phone/contact
System prompt warns against sharing OTP or passwords
Auto-plays AI audio response
